tweets.text:
Step by step, Blockworks is becoming one of these industry’s giants. Not just for data and market intelligence, but for trust.

Impressive to see them acquire Messari, a company valued in the hundreds of millions just a few years ago. This further cements their position as the market leader across their categories, and very much deservedly so.

Proud to call these chads a portfolio company and to work with a team as talented and ambitious as @JasonYanowitz and @MikeIppolito_.

Time to raise the standards of this space to meet what the next 10 years of institutional adoption will demand.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
1/ Blockworks has acquired Messari.

We’re bringing together crypto’s two largest data and market intelligence platforms. https://t.co/pw5f4I0oSU
tweets.full_text:
Step by step, Blockworks is becoming one of these industry’s giants. Not just for data and market intelligence, but for trust.

Impressive to see them acquire Messari, a company valued in the hundreds of millions just a few years ago. This further cements their position as the market leader across their categories, and very much deservedly so.

Proud to call these chads a portfolio company and to work with a team as talented and ambitious as @JasonYanowitz and @MikeIppolito_.

Time to raise the standards of this space to meet what the next 10 years of institutional adoption will demand.

tweets.text: Pay people enough so that they're not under financial stress, but not so much that they become fat and happy. You want your people to be motivated to perform so they can realize their dreams. You don't want people to accept a job for the security of making a lot more money-- you want them to come for the opportunity to earn it through hard and creative work. #principleoftheday

tweets.text: Very cool, former chairman and CEO of Merrill Lynch Stan O’Neal takes over as Chairman of Hut 8. It reminds me that I was actually chairman for a short  period when we started the company back in 2017. It was a very different company then, now it’s a US$13 billion decacorn!
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
Today, E. Stanley (Stan) O'Neal succeeds Founding Chair Bill Tai as Chair of the Hut 8 Board of Directors.

tweets.text: @hillery_dan Why don't you see that people are already completely freaking out about MSTR holding 4%, and that 10%-20% might just make BTC a significantly less interesting asset?

thread_tweets.text: @hillery_dan Why don't you see that people are already completely freaking out about MSTR holding 4%, and that 10%-20% might just make BTC a significantly less interesting asset?
thread_tweets.full_text: @hillery_dan Why don't you see that people are already completely freaking out about MSTR holding 4%, and that 10%-20% might just make BTC a significantly less interesting asset?

thread_tweets.text:
It's not that much about the actual ownership, but rather the fact that the market participants are already going crazy at 4%

BTC is based on social consensus, it's a vibes asset, and increasing MSTR ownership too high might affect the vibes very negatively.

(I've written hundreds of tweets about MSTR and I'm considered by most as a Strategy bull, btw)

tweets.text:
Saylor is basically explaining that when convertible bonds and preferred shares are introduced in the balance sheet, there is no objective and unquestionable definition of the mNAV.

People must have their own expectations about BTC future price action to judge by themselves if an operation is dilutive or accretive for shareholders. Sometimes a decision can be short-terme dilutive but long-term accretive.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text: WATCH: Saylor gives nearly a 10 minute answer when Jack Mallers asks him to define mNAV  🤔 https://t.co/vNYhsHXDJm

tweets.text:
Interesting to notice that SATA, the STRC-like product of Strive, is currently trading at $99 again, while STRC is still at $96, and despite having a similar leverage level as Strategy.

SATA has slightly higher dividend rate and is going to pay dividends daily.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
STRC is back at $97, two days after ticking around $90.5

Third time this happens during a significant BTC drawdown.

The MAIN factor that is moving STRC price is BTC price, by at least an order of magnitude.

Basically STRC holders start panicking when BTC goes down too much, https://t.co/6bSqYJ7jj7
